stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a major American multinational corporation involved in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is an American multinational corporation engaged in the exploration, production, transportation, refining, marketing, and distribution of petroleum products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oy (NEE) is a Finnish company specializing in renewable fuels such as biofuels and hydrogen. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a British multinational oil and gas company. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company headquartered in London. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
